about.description:
Game Developer since 2022, specializing in gameplay systems, playable ads, and mobile game development. Shipped multiple titles across puzzle, platformer, rhythm, and endless runner genres.
Currently at Amanotes, building scalable gameplay systems for music games.
about.quote: Code is temporary, gameplay is forever.

skills.title: Game Development
skills.desc: Unity, C#, Gameplay Systems, Design Patterns, Physics

skills.title: Playable Ads
skills.desc: HTML5, JavaScript, Unity Luna, Ad Network Constraints, Data Tracking

skills.title: Automation & Mass Production
skills.desc: Config-driven modules, No-code theming, Template-based production

skills.title: Optimization & Performance
skills.desc: Build size, FPS, Memory/CPU profiling, Texture & Atlas optimization

skills.title: Vibe Coding
skills.desc: AI-assisted Dev, Rapid Prototyping, Internal AI Tools

timeline.desc: Building playable ads for music games. Config-driven production, optimization, cross-network deployment.
Developed and published multiple mobile games across puzzle, platformer genres.
